step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: We trained a family of transformer protein language models, ESM-2, at scales from 8 million parameters up to 15 billion parameters.
Comparisons are performed at 270,000 training steps for all models in this section.
The 15 billion parameter model reaches a TM-score of 0.72 on the CAMEO test set and 0.55 on the CASP14 test set

step_scores.fix_suggestion: No changes needed; all claims are supported by the text.

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: We developed ESMFold, a fully end-to-end single-sequence structure predictor, by training a folding head for ESM-2
We train the folding head on ~25,000 clusters covering a total of ~325,000 experimentally determined structures from the PDB
ESMFold achieves an average TM-score of 0.83 on CAMEO and 0.68 on CASP14.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: No changes needed; all claims are supported by the text.

evidence.quote: The CAMEO test set consists of 194 structures... the CASP14 test set consists of 51 publicly released structures

On the CAMEO test set, language model perplexity has a Pearson correlation of -0.52 with the TMscore... on CASP14, the correlation is -0.71

evidence.quote: We use Foldseek (53) to compare the predicted structures with known structures in the PDB.
At thresholds of 0.7 and 0.5 TM-score, Foldseek reports 25.4% (253,905 proteins) and 12.6% (125,765 proteins) without a match
